name: MailFlow
description: MailFlow is a modern, self-hosted email management and routing platform. Native installation with Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis — no Docker required. Full-featured webmail with IMAP/SMTP support, unified inbox, advanced filtering, and more.

notes.text: MailFlow listens on HTTPS (port 443) using a self-signed certificate. Accept the browser security warning on first access.
Native installation with Node.js 20, PostgreSQL 16, and Redis — no Docker overhead.
All secrets (SESSION_SECRET, DB_PASSWORD, ENCRYPTION_KEY) are auto-generated on first install and stored in /opt/mailflow/.env.
The backend runs via systemd service. Update with: cd /opt/mailflow && git pull && cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm ci --omit=dev && systemctl restart mailflow
